parsed.recommendation_text: For a budget-conscious user prioritizing quality, the Sony WH-CH710N offers an excellent balance of features and performance. With good noise cancellation, impressive battery life, and a mid-range price point, it stands out for its durability and sound quality. While not as premium as higher-end models, it delivers solid value with LDAC support and a comfortable design. JBL Tune 750NC and Edifier W82BT are also strong contenders but fall short in build quality and noise cancellation.
parsed.selection_rationale: Offers best balance of features and price for budget-conscious users.
